text.title: Agency Rebrand Methodology Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agency Rebrand Methodology output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: founder email body sent to active clients

forbidden.pattern: client notice sent <30 days before public launch
redirect_map omits URLs with verified organic traffic
addendum renegotiates commercial terms (must be assignment-only)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: old_brand populated with a typed value
new_brand populated with a typed value
client_notice_template populated with a typed value
contract_addendum_template populated with a typed value
redirect_map populated with a typed value
portfolio_migration_status populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
